raw_title: Audience Expectations of Journalists: Demands, Beliefs and Assessments
title_en: Audience Expectations of Journalists: Demands, Beliefs and Assessments
title_zh: 受众对记者的期望：需求、信念与评估
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们对记者有什么样的期望，包括他们希望记者做什么、相信记者应该具备哪些品质，以及如何评价记者的工作。
plain_summary_en: This study explores what people expect from journalists, including what they want journalists to do, what qualities they believe journalists should have, and how they evaluate journalists' work.
research_direction_zh: 新闻学中的受众研究，关注公众对新闻职业的认知、期望与信任构建。
research_direction_en: Audience studies in journalism, focusing on public perceptions, expectations, and trust-building regarding the journalism profession.
